tools.description: Add a variable to the Variables part of a GeneXus object.
tools.name: genexus_add_variable

tools.description: Use this for cross-object semantic analysis: impact, dependencies, complexity, naming, summary. See tool-help for mode selection.

waitForIndex.description: mode=impact: block up to 30s for Ready index (default true).

tools.name: genexus_analyze

tools.description: Apply a pattern (e.g. WorkWithPlus) to a parent. IDE 'Right-click → Apply Pattern'. Inspect parentType first: Transaction=family-gen, WebPanel/SDPanel=direct-attach (pass settings.template). Others rejected. mode=diagnose returns structured findings without mutating.

mode.description: apply (default) mutates; diagnose returns reasons without applying.

validate.description: After apply, build the generated host. Adds validation block (60-180s). Catches binding errors.

tools.name: genexus_apply_pattern

tools.description: Apply visual template: kpi_header | empty_state | confirm_dialog. See tool-help for args per template.
tools.name: genexus_apply_template

tools.description: Find, read, or write binary assets inside the active KB.
tools.name: genexus_asset

tools.description: Git blame for an object part. Returns commit/author/date per line. When line is set, returns just that line. Returns code='KbNotInGit' when the KB isn't a git working tree, code='PartNotTracked' with candidates[] when no tracked file matches.

context.description: Snippet ±N lines around the blamed line (default 2).

filePath.description: KB-relative or absolute path to a tracked file. Use when name+part doesn't disambiguate.

line.description: 1-based line number. When omitted, blames the whole file.

name.description: Object name. Either name or filePath is required.

tools.name: genexus_blame

tools.description: Apply N independent edits. Item: {name,part?,content,type?,dryRun?}. stopOnError halts at first fail. transactional=true snapshots all targets pre-edit and rolls back prior successes on first Error.

transactional.description: Atomic batch: rollback prior successes on first Error.

tools.name: genexus_bulk_edit

tools.description: Create any IDE-creatable object (Transaction, Procedure, WebPanel, SDPanel, SDT, DataProvider, Domain, Dashboard...). Domain takes dataType+length or enumValues. NOT for WorkWithPlus (use genexus_apply_pattern) or popups with inputs (use genexus_create_popup).
tools.name: genexus_create_object

tools.description: Create popup WebPanel with Form type="layout" body (radio/combo render editable). Spec: title, inputs, buttons, inParms, outParms.

dryRun.description: Validate spec + render layout XML without persisting the WebPanel.

showWhen.description: e.g. "X == 'S'"; emits Refresh toggling group visibility.

tools.name: genexus_create_popup

tools.description: Transaction↔DB schema drift. action=check structured; report adds markdown.
tools.name: genexus_db_drift

tools.description: Delete an object from the KB. Irreversible — confirm=true required.
tools.name: genexus_delete_object

tools.description: Remove a variable. Idempotent. Refuses GAM/WWP+ framework-managed vars.
tools.name: genexus_delete_variable

tools.description: Unified text diff. mode=textVsText|currentVsText.
tools.name: genexus_diff

tools.description: Use to generate structured docs (wiki, sequence diagrams, health reports). Don't use for programmatic analysis (see genexus_analyze) or source (see genexus_read).
tools.name: genexus_doc

tools.description: Edit object part. name or targets (exclusive). mode: full|patch|ops. dryRun first. For WWP edit host's PatternInstance NOT the parent WebForm (gets overwritten on reapply).

ops.description: RFC 6902 JSON-Patch ops. Supported: add, remove, replace, test.

replaceAll.description: patch mode only. Apply to ALL occurrences instead of requiring expectedCount to match exactly.

validate.description: strict (default) aborts on first error. best-effort applies what compiles. only runs in-memory, no persist.

tools.name: genexus_edit

tools.description: Edit + rebuild callers in one call. Returns edit diff + impact + build operationId.

content.description: New content. For mode=patch may be {find,replace} object.

patch.description: Same shape as genexus_edit.patch. Auto-sets mode=patch.

tools.name: genexus_edit_and_build

tools.description: Semantic WebForm edits. Actions: add_textblock, add_button, set_visibility, remove_control, wrap_in_fieldset.
tools.name: genexus_edit_form

tools.description: Export a GeneXus object part to a text file on disk.
tools.name: genexus_export_object

tools.description: Export an object's full state (all parts) as a single JSON envelope.
tools.name: genexus_export_unified

tools.description: Generate new code or structures from templates or translations.
tools.name: genexus_forge

tools.description: Format a GeneXus code snippet using worker rules.
tools.name: genexus_format

tools.description: List/read/save/restore object history snapshots. restore + discard=true = IDE 'Discard changes' parity.

discard.description: restore-only: drop in-memory edits, restore last persisted baseline for (name,part).

dryRun.description: restore-only: return unified diff of snapshot vs current without writing.

tools.name: genexus_history

tools.description: Import a text file from disk into a GeneXus object part.
tools.name: genexus_import_object

tools.description: Inject SDT structures and Procedure signatures of called objects.
tools.name: genexus_inject_context

tools.description: Use to snapshot an object: metadata, variables, structure, signature. Raw shape, no source text — use genexus_read for code. runtimeIds requires a prior build.
tools.name: genexus_inspect

tools.description: Manage open KBs and KB-level startup config. Actions list/open/close/set_default operate on the gateway WorkerPool; set_startup/get_startup mirror the IDE 'Set As Startup Object' right-click action.

alias.description: KB alias. open: auto from path basename if omitted.

path.description: Absolute KB path (required for open if alias not in config).

tools.name: genexus_kb

tools.description: Locate an object in the KB explorer tree. IDE 'Right-click → Locate in KB Explorer' parity. Returns modulePath, fullPath, and up to 20 siblings in the same module.
tools.name: genexus_kb_explorer

tools.description: SDK layout/WebForm ops: get_tree, set_property, find_controls, inspect_surface, scan_mutators.
tools.name: genexus_layout

tools.description: Build, validate, index, or poll the KB. Long ops are async with operationId. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_lifecycle for actions and target formats.

fastIncremental.description: EXPERIMENTAL (item 28). Build only: if EditDirtyTracker has no dirty entries returns nothingDirty=true without dispatch; otherwise hints to skip Specify on clean targets and deploy if dirty set is Procedure/WebPanel/Transaction-only. On any miss falls back to legacy build with fastIncrementalFallback=true + fallbackReason.

includeCallees.description: Build: expand call graph so callees compile first (default transitive).

notifyOnFailure.description: Build: Slack/Discord webhook URL. POST {kb,target,errors,errorsDetailedHead,jobId,durationSec} when build terminal state = Failed (not PartialSuccess).

skipFullDeploy.description: EXPERIMENTAL. Single-target Build + includeCallees=none: skip deploy step. DLL is NOT redeployed; see tool-help.

target.description: Object name(s), taskId, job_id, or op:<id>. Build accepts CSV ('Foo,Bar').

wait_until_done.description: Build/rebuild: block in one turn until terminal (up to wait_seconds, default 600).

tools.name: genexus_lifecycle

tools.description: List objects with pagination. Feed nextOffset until hasMore=false. Returns minimal shape by default (name, type, path, parent); verbose=true for full shape.

cursor.description: Opaque token from prior nextCursor. Use with sort=lastUpdate for stable paging.

filter.description: Legacy: name OR description. Prefer nameFilter/descriptionFilter.

modifiedBefore.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate < modifiedBefore.

projection.description: minimal=name+type+lastUpdate; standard=default compact; verbose=all fields. Overrides axiCompact when set.

since.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate >= since.

tools.name: genexus_list_objects

tools.description: Read worker_debug.log tail. target=<obj> filters by object name; tail=N last N lines (default 100); since=<ISO|'crash'> lines after timestamp or from last ERROR marker. Response includes logPath so the agent can read other logs directly.

since.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp to filter lines after, or 'crash' to slice from the last ERROR/CRITICAL marker.

target.description: Only return lines mentioning this object name.

tools.name: genexus_logs

tools.description: Change variable type atomically. Preserves name + description.
tools.name: genexus_modify_variable

tools.description: View navigation report for an object. IDE 'Right-click → View Navigation / View Last Navigation' parity. latest=true returns the most recent cached report from .gx/navigation-cache; otherwise runs a fresh navigation.

latest.description: Return the most recent cached navigation if any; otherwise run fresh.

tools.name: genexus_navigation

tools.description: Welcome card for a new session: KB name/path, last 5 edited objects, top 3 KB-applicable gotchas, top 5 most-used tools. Cheaper than whoami for mid-session context refresh.
tools.name: genexus_orient

tools.description: Render WebPanel via headless Chrome. Opens launcher, fills parms, navigates, captures HTML/a11y/screenshot, optionally diffs vs baseline.

action.description: run = auto-resolve launcher (IDE F5 parity). render = explicit name.

tools.name: genexus_preview

tools.description: Read or update GeneXus object properties. Note: Description is the title-bar text shown when a WebPanel/Popup is opened via .Popup().

control.description: Optional. Layout control name (e.g. BtnConfirmar), variable name with & prefix (e.g. &Alu2RegProf), or attribute name.

tools.name: genexus_properties

tools.description: Search objects in the active KB. Supports prefixes (type:, usedby:, parent:, parentPath:, description:). Compact projection by default. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_query for examples.

cursor.description: Opaque token from prior nextCursor. Use with sort=lastUpdate for stable paging.

modifiedBefore.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate < modifiedBefore.

since.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate >= since.

sort.description: relevance (default) or lastUpdate (newest first; bypasses score ranking).

tools.name: genexus_query

tools.description: Read source/metadata parts of one or more objects. Pass name or targets, plus parts=[...]. Paginate large source with offset/limit. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_read for examples.

parts.description: When set, only the listed parts are returned in a combined response. Mutually exclusive with part/offset/limit.

tools.name: genexus_read

tools.description: Step-by-step playbook for a named flow ('wwp_on_transaction', 'create_popup', etc.). name='list' to enumerate.
tools.name: genexus_recipe

tools.description: Run GeneXus refactor: rename, extract procedure, or WWP condition set.

target.description: Primary object or symbol to refactor.

tools.name: genexus_refactor

tools.description: Resolve runtime URL for a KB object (active Environment webRoot + aspx + URL-encoded positional args). Optional gamSession='auto'|{user,pass,repository?} captures GAM session cookies via HTTP login. Does NOT open a browser — pipe the returned url into chrome-devtools-axi.

gamSession.description: 'auto' (use GXMCP_GAM_USER/PASS env) or {user, pass, repository?, loginUrl?}.

tools.name: genexus_run_object

tools.description: Dump SDK surface (types/methods/props) to docs/sdk-probe/. Use when hunting for entry points.
tools.name: genexus_sdk_probe

tools.description: Regex/semantic search across Procedure/DataProvider/WebPanel/Transaction source.

argMatches.description: Positional arg index to expected literal text.

fields.description: Fields to search. Default [source]. Add caption/description/parmNames to widen.

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. Inline reads of top N distinct objects in response.

tools.name: genexus_search_source

tools.description: Audit KB-level GAM / security configuration. action=audit_gam scans IntegratedSecurityLevel, encryption, token expiry, and hardcoded secrets in env props. action=scan_secrets searches Procedure/WebPanel/SDT Source for credential-shaped literals (JWT, PEM, password=..., AKIA, etc.). Returns findings with severity.
tools.name: genexus_security

tools.description: SQL for a Transaction/Table (DDL) or a procedure For Each navigation.
tools.name: genexus_sql

tools.description: Read or update visual and logical structure of GeneXus objects.
tools.name: genexus_structure

tools.description: Execute native GeneXus tests (GXtest).
tools.name: genexus_test

tools.description: Revert the last N edits from EditSnapshotStore (.gx/snapshots). Best-effort: reports which succeeded when any fail.

last.description: Number of snapshots to revert (default 1, max 20).

tools.name: genexus_undo

tools.description: Pre-flight: parse + SDK schema scan + would-be diff vs current state. No save.
tools.name: genexus_validate_payload

tools.description: KB context + version + playbooks. Call FIRST every session — playbooks block routes you to the right tool.
tools.name: genexus_whoami

tools.description: Reload worker. soft (default): drain + respawn. hard: copy sourceDir + respawn. warm (EXPERIMENTAL, item 51): persist IndexCacheService snapshot before reload; restore on boot if worker-dll SHA matches. force=true: gateway kills directly (use when worker is hung).

force.description: Bypass drain; gateway kills + respawns. Use when worker is wedged.

tools.name: genexus_worker_reload
